creator: mbeis@xs4all.nl
text:
When trying to start LyX it tries to start with a geometry like 20000x0.
Starting in an xterm results in an error message:

qt.qpa.xcb: xcb_shm_create_segment() can't be called for size 17179344900, maximumallowed size is 4294967295

It looks like a qt problem, but LyX is the only qt-application that does this.
